target_phenotype: Morphological cell phenotype — cell and nuclear shape, texture, and intensity features across 5 imaging channels (DNA, microtubules, actin, mitochondria, membrane/Golgi)

perturbation.library_or_reagent: Essential-wide sgRNA library (~5,300 genes + 249 non-targeting controls)

readout.measurement: High-content fluorescence imaging of fixed cells
readout.instrument_or_platform: Optical pooled screening (in situ sequencing + imaging)
readout.primary_metric: Morphological feature vectors — genes are clustered by similarity of phenotypic profiles across imaging channels

clustering.method: Leiden clustering on PHATE-embedded phenotypic profiles

parameters.n_genes_note: Includes 249 individual non-targeting control guides; ~5,299 are targeting genes

notes: RPE1 cells — the only non-HeLa screen in the collection. Non-transformed cell line provides a different cellular context than HeLa. 5-channel morphology screen with broad organelle coverage (DNA, cytoskeleton, actin, mitochondria, membrane). All cell cycle phases included. Clusters represent sets of genes whose knockout produces similar morphological phenotypes.
